scripts.chroma:stop: lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null && echo 'ChromaDB stopped' || echo 'ChromaDB was not running'
scripts.chroma:status: curl -sf http://localhost:8000/api/v2/heartbeat > /dev/null && echo 'ChromaDB ✓  running on :8000' || echo 'ChromaDB ✗  not running'
scripts.dev:full: npx chroma run --path ./.chroma-data --port 8000 & sleep 3 && bun dev
scripts.stop:all: { lsof -ti:3000 -ti:8000 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null && echo 'All services stopped'; } || echo 'Nothing running'
